name: Chris Redlitz
summary: Tech entrepreneur and Managing Partner of Transmedia Capital; co-founded the KickLabs accelerator. With Beverly Parenti, launched The Last Mile inside San Quentin in 2010.
alt: Avatar with monogram CR for Chris Redlitz, Co-Founder of The Last Mile.

name: Beverly Parenti
summary: Serial entrepreneur focused on advancing innovative technologies. Co-founded The Last Mile in 2010 to bring education and tech training inside San Quentin.
alt: Avatar with monogram BP for Beverly Parenti, Co-Founder of The Last Mile.

name: Kevin McCracken
summary: Returned citizen and longtime advocate for second-chance employment. Stepped into the Executive Director role in 2024 — the first formerly-incarcerated leader of TLM.
alt: Avatar with monogram KM for Kevin McCracken, Executive Director of The Last Mile.

name: Tulio Cardozo
summary: Founding graduate of TLM's Entrepreneurship Program. Now a Staff Infrastructure Engineer supporting TLM's learning services, proprietary network, and devices across three time zones.
alt: Avatar with monogram TC for Tulio Cardozo, Staff Infrastructure Engineer at The Last Mile.

name: Alysha Eppard
summary: Walked out of prison in September 2024 and now builds web features for the Indiana Pacers — through TLM's training and a fair-chance hiring partnership.
alt: Avatar with monogram AE for Alysha Eppard, TLM alumna at the Indiana Pacers.

name: Ken Oliver
summary: VP of Checkr.org and Executive Director of the Checkr Foundation. Joined TLM's Board of Directors in July 2023 to scale fair-chance employment nationwide.
alt: Avatar with monogram KO for Ken Oliver, TLM Board of Directors and Checkr.org VP.
